info.title: enterprise-service
info.description: HTTP Service for managing enterprise specific operations

account.title: Account
account.description:
Represents a platform level account
registration, authentication and authorization.

account_id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the account.

enterprise_id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the enterprise to which the account belongs.

account.description: A shorthand identifier for the associated account

company.description: Name of the company which owns the account

deactivated.description: Indicates if the account has been deactivated or not

external_id.description: And identifier that can be used to reference and id from a different system

plan.description: Billing plan and associated feature information pertaining

type.description: The new billing plan type to assign the target account once attached

quota.description: Quota information pertaining to the account

retention.description: Data retention policy information pertaining to the account
Data retention policy information pertaining to the account

status.description: Indication the account's current activation state

created.description: Indicates when the account was created

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: An Enterprise represents a grouping of platform Accounts under a single entity.

enterprise_id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the Enterprise.

name.description: A machine-friendly name for the Enterprise.

parent_enterprise_id.description: The ID of the parent Enterprise, if any.

partner.description: Name of the partner which owns the Enterprise.

status.description: Indicates the status of the Enterprise.

accounts.description: The list of Accounts that belong to this Enterprise.

account-owner.title: Account Owner
account-owner.description: Represents the user that is considered the sole owner of an account

user_id.description: Unique identifier which can be used to reference a specific user.

firstname.description: Name of user given to them upon birth.

lastname.description: Common family or surname of the user.

email.description:
Used primarily as a means of authentication during login.
Additionally, this is the address where platform emails intended for the user
will be sent.

name.description: Full name of the user. Generally the combination of firstname and lastname.

accounts.description:
List of short account id which indicate all accounts
under which a user is a member of.

enterprise_ids.description:
List of ids which indicate all enterprise accounts
under which a user is a member of.

verified.description:
Indication of wheather the user has completed the registration process
and confirmed to be a legitimate permison.

account-bulk-operations-request.title: Account Bulk Operations Request
account-bulk-operations-request.description: Request body for bulk operations on accounts

items.title: Bulk Operation
items.description: Represents a single bulk operation on an entity

operation_id.title: Client generated id to associate operation with result
operation_id.description:
Used for navigation only, not persisted in database.
If not provided, the array index (as string) will be used in the response

entity_id.title: Entity unique identifier
entity_id.description:
The identifier of the entity for UPDATE and DELETE operations.
MUST be null or omitted for CREATE operations

bulk-operation-account.title: Bulk Operation
bulk-operation-account.description: Represents a single bulk operation on an entity

operation_id.description:
Used for navigation only, not persisted in database.
If not provided, the array index (as string) will be used in the response

entity_id.description:
The identifier of the entity for UPDATE and DELETE operations.
MUST be null or omitted for CREATE operations

account-bulk-operations-response.description: Response body for bulk operations on accounts

status.title: Overall status of the bulk operation

operations.title: List of bulk operations
operations.description: Results for each operation from the request. Should be in the same order as the request operations

items.title: Bulk Operation Result
items.description: Represents the result of a single bulk operation on an entity

operation_id.title: Matching operation_id or index from request
operation_id.description:
Matches the operation_id from the request if provided,
otherwise the index of the operation as a string

entity_id.title: Entity identifier
entity_id.description: Entity identifier for UPDATE / DELETE operations

result.title: Operation result
result.description: Result details for a single operation

detail.title: Human readable message
detail.description: Detailed message about the operation result

context.title: Detailed error information
context.description:
List of objects providing additional context
for errors or failures

bulk-operation-result-account.title: Bulk Operation Result
bulk-operation-result-account.description: Represents the result of a single bulk operation on an entity

operation_id.title: Matching operation_id or index from request
operation_id.description:
Matches the operation_id from the request if provided,
otherwise the index of the operation as a string

account-create-request.title: Account
account-create-request.description:
Represents a platform level account
registration, authentication and authorization.

company.description: Name of the company which owns the account

external_id.description: And identifier that can be used to reference and id from a different system

plan.description: Billing plan and associated feature information pertaining

type.description: The new billing plan type to assign the target account once attached

retention.description: Data retention policy information pertaining to the account

enable_syslog.title: Enable Syslog Ingestion
enable_syslog.description: Enables syslog ingestion for the new account via custom ports.

include_admins.title: Auto join all enterprise admins
include_admins.description: If true, all enterprise admins will be added as members of the child account

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.description: A Pipeline record represents a pipeline and its configuration for a given account.

id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the Pipeline.

account_id.description: The account ID associated with the Pipeline.

title.description: A human-friendly name for the Pipeline.

partition_id.description: The partition ID associated with the Pipeline.

created_at.description: The date and time when the Pipeline was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the Pipeline was last updated.

published_at.description: The date and time when the Pipeline was published.

deployment_groups.description: The deployment groups associated with the Pipeline.

published_revision_id.description: The ID of the published revision of the Pipeline.

deployed_revision_id.description: The ID of the deployed revision of the Pipeline.

loaded_revision_id.description: The ID of the loaded revision of the Pipeline.

processing_status.description: The processing status of the Pipeline.

deploy_type.description: The deployment type of the Pipeline.

replay_config.description: The replay configuration for the Pipeline.

pipeline-metric-usage.title: PipelineMetricUsage
pipeline-metric-usage.description: A PipelineMetricUsage record represents the usage metric for a pipeline node for a given account.

edge_id.description: The edge ID associated with the usage metric.

pipeline_id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the Pipeline.

account_id.description: The account ID associated with the usage metric.

node_id.description: The node ID associated with the usage metric.

node_kind.description: The kind of the node (e.g. sink, source, transform).

deleted.description: Whether the pipeline has been deleted.

at.description: The timestamp of the usage metric.

byte_size.description: The byte size of the usage metric.

pipeline-metric-health.title: PipelineMetricHealth
pipeline-metric-health.description: A PipelineMetricHealth record represents the health metric for a pipeline for a given account.

pipeline_id.description: A value that uniquely identifies the Pipeline.

account_id.description: The account ID associated with the health metric.

edge_id.description: The edge ID associated with the log entry.

is_stale.description: Whether the log entry is stale.

last_seen_at.description: The timestamp when this log entry was last seen.

captured_data.description: Captured data associated with the log entry.

logs.description: Health log entries for the node.

edge_id.description: The edge ID associated with the log entry.

is_stale.description: Whether the log entry is stale.

last_seen_at.description: The timestamp when this log entry was last seen.

captured_data.description: Captured data associated with the log entry.

logs.description: Health log entries for the node.

transform_groups.description: Transform group nodes of the pipeline.

edge_id.description: The edge ID associated with the log entry.

is_stale.description: Whether the log entry is stale.

last_seen_at.description: The timestamp when this log entry was last seen.

captured_data.description: Captured data associated with the log entry.

logs.description: Health log entries for the node.

pipeline-node.title: PipelineNode
pipeline-node.description: A PipelineNode record represents the available node types, operators and alert schemas for building pipelines.

patch.description:
Moves an existing individual customer account under the owner ship of an
existing enterprise with the option to change its direct owner

owner.description:
Email address of the user acount who will be the new owner of the target
account once it is successfully attached

patch.description:
Removes a specific account from under an enterprise making it an independant
account. The account will be downgraded to a trial account once the process is
complete.

parameters.description: If true, the child org will be deactivated after detachment.

get.summary: Get pipeline usage metrics for all child organizations of an enterprise
get.description: Get pipeline usage metrics for all child organizations of an enterprise

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Define the beginning of the window

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Define the end of the window

parameters.name: bucket
parameters.description: Size of the interval represented by each returned metric result

parameters.name: include_deleted
parameters.description: Include pipelines and nodes that have been deleted

parameters.name: pipeline_id
parameters.description: Limit usage metrics to the given pipeline id. If not defined, the metrics will include all pipelines for the account.

parameters.name: traffic
parameters.description: Limit usage metrics to a single traffic direction. If not defined, the metrics for both directions will be included.
